## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce and familiarize the new mini-pod team members within GrowthX's content creation group.](https://fathom.video/share/hpWgz8pBr7EyGoktuzwyaeoX8-_3DtSu?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Diverse team backgrounds: engineering, journalism, finance, and marketing](https://fathom.video/share/hpWgz8pBr7EyGoktuzwyaeoX8-_3DtSu?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Flexible work hours with emphasis on setting clear availability for meetings](https://fathom.video/share/hpWgz8pBr7EyGoktuzwyaeoX8-_3DtSu?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Airtable to be used for content tracking until transition to Linear](https://fathom.video/share/hpWgz8pBr7EyGoktuzwyaeoX8-_3DtSu?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [1:1 meetings to be scheduled with Carrie for individual client discussions](https://fathom.video/share/hpWgz8pBr7EyGoktuzwyaeoX8-_3DtSu?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions

  - [Ademilade (Ade): Mechanical engineering background, 5 years in marketing, gamer](https://fathom.video/share/hpWgz8pBr7EyGoktuzwyaeoX8-_3DtSu?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [Sadira: Former journalist, oldest team member (joined April), excited about AI integration](https://fathom.video/share/hpWgz8pBr7EyGoktuzwyaeoX8-_3DtSu?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Jenny: 3-4 weeks into onboarding, background in applied arts advertising](https://fathom.video/share/hpWgz8pBr7EyGoktuzwyaeoX8-_3DtSu?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Prateek: 10 years in SEO/marketing, finance master's, junior managing editor role](https://fathom.video/share/hpWgz8pBr7EyGoktuzwyaeoX8-_3DtSu?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [Carrie: Managing editor, background in journalism, advertising, and PR](https://fathom.video/share/hpWgz8pBr7EyGoktuzwyaeoX8-_3DtSu?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)

### Work Structure and Communication

  - [Carrie emphasizes team-oriented, supportive leadership style](https://fathom.video/share/hpWgz8pBr7EyGoktuzwyaeoX8-_3DtSu?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [GrowthX offers flexible working hours](https://fathom.video/share/hpWgz8pBr7EyGoktuzwyaeoX8-_3DtSu?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Team members to set Google Calendar availability for meetings](https://fathom.video/share/hpWgz8pBr7EyGoktuzwyaeoX8-_3DtSu?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Async communication encouraged, with options for voice notes and quick calls](https://fathom.video/share/hpWgz8pBr7EyGoktuzwyaeoX8-_3DtSu?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)

### Content Management

  - [Transitioning from Airtable to Linear for content tracking](https://fathom.video/share/hpWgz8pBr7EyGoktuzwyaeoX8-_3DtSu?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [Temporary continued use of Airtable for centralized updates](https://fathom.video/share/hpWgz8pBr7EyGoktuzwyaeoX8-_3DtSu?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Panzer requesting Airtable updates](https://fathom.video/share/hpWgz8pBr7EyGoktuzwyaeoX8-_3DtSu?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)

### Client Assignments

  - [Ademilade: Firework](https://fathom.video/share/hpWgz8pBr7EyGoktuzwyaeoX8-_3DtSu?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [Jenny: Ziplo and Discern](https://fathom.video/share/hpWgz8pBr7EyGoktuzwyaeoX8-_3DtSu?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [Sadira: Continuing with current clients](https://fathom.video/share/hpWgz8pBr7EyGoktuzwyaeoX8-_3DtSu?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [Prateek: Junior managing editor role, supporting team](https://fathom.video/share/hpWgz8pBr7EyGoktuzwyaeoX8-_3DtSu?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)

### Team Dynamics

  - [Diverse skill sets complement each other (e.g., Prateek's finance expertise, Carrie's developer content preference)](https://fathom.video/share/hpWgz8pBr7EyGoktuzwyaeoX8-_3DtSu?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Emphasis on mutual support and encouragement within the mini-pod](https://fathom.video/share/hpWgz8pBr7EyGoktuzwyaeoX8-_3DtSu?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Set up Google Calendar availability for meetings](https://fathom.video/share/hpWgz8pBr7EyGoktuzwyaeoX8-_3DtSu?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Schedule 1:1 meetings with Carrie to discuss individual client work](https://fathom.video/share/hpWgz8pBr7EyGoktuzwyaeoX8-_3DtSu?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [Update and maintain content progress in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/hpWgz8pBr7EyGoktuzwyaeoX8-_3DtSu?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Collaborate and leverage diverse team expertise for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/hpWgz8pBr7EyGoktuzwyaeoX8-_3DtSu?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
